purpose: Test whether E1 (RBM24-regulated 56 aa exon at STRC aa 1047-1102) is structurally part of the TMEM145 binding interface

success_criteria.strc_mini_x_tmem145_full_v2: ipTM > 0.6; residues 1047-1102 in STRC show low PAE with TMEM145 chain
success_criteria.strc_mini_dE1_x_tmem145_full: ipTM drops vs v2 by >0.15 — confirms E1 is in the interface
success_criteria.strc_mini_dE1_solo: pTM < 0.75 — indicates E1 contributes to fold stability
success_criteria.strc_mini_x_tmem145_gold: ipTM > 0.7 — Derstroff-style pruned job for clearer interface

daily_limit: AF3 server 20 jobs/day — all 4 fit easily
related_note: ~/Brain/notes/STRC RBM24 Exon Mapping to Human Protein.md
